projects.title: Automated ESI Triage Tags
projects.desc: Implement Emergency Severity Index (ESI Levels 1-5) automated EHR level tags upon patient intake.

projects.title: Bed Allocation Latency Optimization
projects.desc: Decrease median triage-to-bed time from 48 minutes to under 18 minutes by streamlining flow protocols.

projects.title: Digital SBAR Handoff Checklist
projects.desc: Implement clinical SBAR handoff verification checklist prior to transferring triage patients out of the ED.

projects.title: Live Care Journey Tracker UI
projects.desc: Build real-time mobile and dashboard tracker updates for viewing lab status, physician rounds, and medications.

projects.title: Interactive Room Transition Map
projects.desc: Smooth transfer tracking interface between Emergency ED, Surgery OR, PACU, and post-acute wards.

projects.title: Automated Discharge Enablement
projects.desc: Streamline discharge flow tracking, coordinated pharmacy prescriptions, and post-acute transport bookings.
